meta.title: Hedge Fund AI Pipeline — Investor Risk & Return Matrix
meta.compounding_note: Monthly profit is fixed on INITIAL capital each month. Balance grows linearly. Position size does not scale with growing balance.
meta.disclaimer: Illustrative projections only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

configuration.compounding: Monthly profit fixed on initial capital. Balance = capital + (monthly_profit × month_number). No reinvestment scaling.
